label: File Reader
description: Reads the contents of a file from the filesystem

parameters.name: path
parameters.description: Absolute or relative path to the file to read

label: Web Search
description: Searches the web and returns the top N results with snippets

parameters.name: num_results
parameters.description: Number of results to return (default: 5, max: 20)

label: Send Email
description: Sends an email message via SMTP

parameters.name: body
parameters.description: Email body content (plain text or HTML)
